overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rainy neon-lit city street. The player passes various billboards, a bright purple adult club, and medical clinics before crossing a street in a futuristic urban environment with reflective wet pavement.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past illuminated billboards and benches

colorful food advertisement billboard with 'Explosion of Taste' text
yellow illuminated benches along the sidewalk under the billboards
concrete planters with green plants separating walkway from building

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy Night City sidewalk with the player walking past large illuminated billboards including a police department advertisement. Yellow benches and concrete planters line the left side while a pedestrian in red stands near the railing on the right. The wet pavement reflects the surrounding neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: adult entertainment club entrance with intense purple neon lighting

events.description: entering area dominated by bright purple neon lighting from the Lust club facade

agents.ego_description: walking past the bright purple neon club entrance where several people are gathered

notable_agents.action: club patron standing outside the entrance looking at a device

entered.detail: building facade covered in intense purple vertical neon light strips
large pink neon heart-shaped sign with 'Lust' text

segments.scene_description: The player enters a zone dominated by intense purple and pink neon lighting from the Lust adult club. The building facade features vertical purple light strips and prominent neon signage including a heart-shaped 'Lust' sign and 'XXX' text. Several NPCs stand near the entrance as the player walks past the sheltered area.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical clinic district with green cross signage

events.description: exiting purple neon area into darker street illuminated by green medical clinic signs

agents.ego_description: walking past the medical clinic with green neon signage while navigating the wet sidewalk

entered.detail: building with pharmaceutical clinic signage and green illuminated cross symbols
bright green neon medical cross symbol on building facade
stairs leading down to a lower plaza level with reflective water surfaces

segments.scene_description: Leaving the purple neon club behind, the player enters a darker section of street dominated by a medical clinic with bright green cross signage. The environment shifts from pink/purple to green and yellow lighting. A sunken plaza entrance becomes visible ahead as the player continues along the rain-soaked pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza and street crossing with reflective wet surfaces

events.description: emerging from narrow street into open plaza area with sunken water feature and broader street view
approaching and crossing the street alongside other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking across the street intersection with a group of pedestrians while avoiding traffic

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in the same direction as the player

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crosswalk across the wet asphalt street
elevated walkway structure crossing above the street with illuminated signage
large digital screen displaying a red stylized face or mask advertisement

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a wide-open urban plaza with a sunken water feature reflecting the city lights. The scene opens up to show an overhead pedestrian bridge and large digital billboards. The player joins a crowd of pedestrians crossing the wet street, with sparse vehicle traffic visible on the road. The environment transitions from enclosed corridors to an open intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a rainy urban corridor that transitions from a neon-lit sidewalk into a wide, open city intersection. It begins on a wet pavement reflecting illuminated police billboards and yellow benches, moving past a pedestrian in red. As the camera advances, the environment is suddenly saturated by intense purple and pink light from the Lust adult club, with its heart-shaped signage and vertical light strips dominating the view. The scene then shifts toward a darker stretch of street where the pink glow fades into the bright green and yellow lighting of a medical clinic, leading the way toward a sunken plaza. Finally, the enclosed feeling of the street opens up into a vast urban intersection featuring a reflective water feature and an overhead pedestrian bridge as the camera joins a crowd crossing the rain-soaked road.
